visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic bottle of mineral water, located in the back row.
A green soda can, located in the front row, blocking the clear water bottle.
A red soda can, located in the front row, blocking the clear water bottle.
A white can with purple graphics on the left side of the shelf.
A black can located behind the white milkis can.

action_plan.explanation: The green soda can is in front and physically blocks the robot's access to the clear water bottle.
The red soda can is also in the front row and blocks access to the clear water bottle.
The path to the clear water bottle is now clear, and it can be picked up.
